prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为269→965→636→340→1155，波动较大。2024年因新高考改革分物理类/历史类，物理类最低位次340；2025年大幅后移至1155，主要受英语（医学英语）专业（min_rank=1155）拉低影响。2025年基准位次约1155名；本省理科/物理类计划：2021年14人、2022年17人、2023年17人、2024年16人、2025年17人；2026年计划18人，较2025年扩招1人（+5.88%），小幅扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属北京大学，985/211/双一流，软科主榜北京大学2026年排名第2，属全国顶尖层次；北京大学2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及校园安全、录取争议等），但北大医学部作为独立招生代码，受整体声誉影响有限；抖音热度北京大学排名第3（高热），医学类专业关注度持续高企；依托北京大学学科评估：临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+，均为全国顶尖水平，对医学类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年热度指数70.19（推荐），口腔医学72.31（推荐），医学类专业持续高热；黑龙江省2026年考生总数167000人，较2025年物理类+历史类合计172114人略有下降，但分科人数需估算；省控线物理类2025年本科批360分、特殊类型472分，与2024年持平；北京大学医学部位于北京（非本省），无本地招生倾斜；该校在黑龙江省招生占比约2.2%（2025年13人/全国598人），属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年扩招1人（+5.88%）使竞争略加剧、医学类专业热度持续高位、考生总数基本稳定等因素，预计2026年最低位次在2025年1155名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约1226名，区间1079–1373名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 269 → 965 → 636 → 340 → 1155, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform dividing into physics/history categories, the minimum ranking for physics category was 340; in 2025, it shifted significantly backward to 1155, mainly influenced by the English (Medical English) major (min_rank=1155). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1155; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 14 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18, an increase of 1 (+5.88%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science ranking, Peking University ranked 2nd in 2026, placing it at the national top level. Peking University's reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative (mainly involving campus safety, admission controversies, etc.), but the Health Science Center, as an independent admission code, is limitedly affected by the overall reputation. On Douyin, Peking University ranks 3rd (high popularity), with medical majors consistently attracting high attention. Relying on Peking University's discipline evaluations: Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Nursing A+, all at the national top level, making it extremely attractive to medical students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), Stomatology 72.31 (recommended), with medical majors remaining highly popular. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province is 167,000, slightly decreasing from the combined 172,114 in 2025 (physics + history categories), but the number by subject needs estimation. The provincial control line for physics category in 2025: undergraduate batch 360, special type 472, unchanged from 2024. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing (not within the province), with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.2% (13 in 2025 out of 598 nationally), which is a normal out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025 as a baseline, the slight intensification of competition due to the 1-person increase (+5.88%) in 2026, the sustained high popularity of medical majors, and the basically stable total number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 ranking of 1155. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1226, with a range of 1079–1373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (MD-PhD Program)
- Stomatology (MD-PhD Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Basic Medicine (MD-PhD Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Pharmacy (Master's-PhD Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Master's-PhD Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- English (Medical English)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 1079–1373, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1000), you can focus on aiming for the Clinical Medicine/Stomatology MD-PhD programs. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (after 1300), it is advisable to choose the Tier 3 English (Medical English) major as a safe option.
